engaged_works.ascription_notes: Routed from the 2026-05-10 Tier-1 publication backlog as an on-disk source witness.
engaged_works.summary: This on-disk text is being wired into the Source tab as a citation witness for Ayon Maharaj, Maharaj 2018 Infinite Paths To Infinite Reality. The entry is intentionally minimal: it records the routed file and basic bibliographic shape so the site can surface the source while fuller review waits. A later pass should tighten the title, edition, and passage coverage against the on-disk witness.

core_thesis: Maharaj reconstructs Ramakrishna's vijñāna Vedānta as the thesis that the Infinite is irreducibly personal and impersonal, with form and without form, so that religious diversity answers to real manifestations rather than projections of an unknowable noumenon. His comparative burden is therefore twofold: to reject sectarian flattenings of Vedānta and to defend a manifestationist pluralism in which divergent salvific paths disclose distinct but compatible aspects of one Infinite Reality ([Infinite Paths to Infinite Reality, ch. 1](cite://maharaj/infinite-paths-to-infinite-reality/1); [Infinite Paths to Infinite Reality, ch. 5](cite://maharaj/infinite-paths-to-infinite-reality/5)).
